news.title: ASX dips as tech stocks continue to slump; oil prices rise
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket fell slightly on Friday, but the local bourse held on to much of its gains from earlier in the week.

news.title: ASX Runners of the Week: Sparc Tech, Resolution, Jindalee & OD6 Metals
news.snippet: The Bulls N’ Bears ASX Runner of the Week is… Sparc Technologies, after its shares soared on a podcast appearance that ignited its multi-billion-dollar graphene disruption story.

news.title: ‘Complete bulls***’: Debate erupts over claims property tax overhaul will drive rents up 30 per cent
news.snippet: Australians are bracing for a major shake-up that experts warn could trigger a chain reaction with devastating consequences.

news.title: Bank’s second rate hike in two weeks
news.snippet: A major bank has increased its fixed home loan rates for the second time in two weeks, losing its title as the cheapest lender.

news.title: Gold coin rush: How TikTok spun the passive income dream of the luxe laundromat
news.snippet: The business of the humble spin-dry has caught the attention of entrepreneurs and private equity investors. Is it fool’s gold?

news.title: Work from home tax claims restricted after ATO court victory
news.snippet: The Federal Court has knocked back a claim from an ABC radio presenter who entered $6000 in home rent  as an expense.

news.title: Kaiser builds $45.6M war chest on steady Vic,Tassie gold output
news.snippet: Kaiser Reef has bolstered its cash pile to A$45.6m after producing 5534 ounces of gold, while simultaneously slashing debt and clearing its gold loan.

news.title: ASX records biggest weekly surge since 2022
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has defied daily losses to achieve its most impressive weekly surge since 2022, as geopolitical tensions from the Middle East ceasefire continue to rattle markets.

news.title: Bank’s surprise call on May rate hike
news.snippet: A bank has predicted a third interest rate hike in 2026, but has gone against the major banks on when it will hit Australians.

news.title: Aurum clears 4M ounces after West African gold resource surge
news.snippet: Aurum’s Napié gold resource in West Africa rose to 1.2M ounces, lifting group inventories to 4.2M ounces. Only 13% of the shear zone has been drilled, with strong growth upside.

news.title: New Zealand cyclone forces cancellation of Supercars race
What happens when a drone-killer and toxic radio collide?
news.snippet: Australia’s controversial multibillion-dollar defence star has made an unusual pick to rehabilitate its corporate reputation.
